testcase.name: App Launch - Initial State

failure.message: LLM judge error: Could not resolve authentication method. Expected either apiKey or authToken to be set. Or for one of the "X-Api-Key" or "Authorization" headers to be explicitly omitted

testcase.failure: Judge error: Could not resolve authentication method. Expected either apiKey or authToken to be set. Or for one of the "X-Api-Key" or "Authorization" headers to be explicitly omitted
